name: Carrot Blush
recipeIngredient: 6 leaves of Romaine or other leaf lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub organic carrots or peel the carrots if they are not organic.
2. Clean and cut beet into slender wedges, then wash and dry lettuce and spinach leaves.
3. Juice half of the carrots, and the beet.
4. Use the remaining carrots to help push the lettuce and spinach through the juicer.
